instruction: Write a FreeMarker template defining a macro `alertBox` that wraps nested content in a div with role="alert" and a CSS class derived from `level` (info, warning, error). Use `<#nested>` for the body. Escape the level string used in class names.
code:
<#-- Macro: alertBox(level) with nested body --> <#macro alertBox level="info">
<#nested>
<#-- Usage example --> <@alertBox level="warning">
